# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Write Linkerd Server and ServerAuthorization resources for microservices. Define which services can communicate with each other. Configure port-based and service account-based authorization rules. This is for our zero-trust service mesh.
# Category: linkerd_authz_missing

apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: product-server
  namespace: backend
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: product-service
  port: 8080
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: product-auth-frontend-web
  namespace: backend
spec:
  server:
    name: product-server
  client:
    unauthenticated: false
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: web-app
          namespace: frontend
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: product-auth-backend-order
  namespace: backend
spec:
  server:
    name: product-server
  client:
    unauthenticated: false
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: order-service
          namespace: backend
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: order-server
  namespace: backend
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: order-service
  port: 8080
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: order-auth-frontend-web
  namespace: backend
spec:
  server:
    name: order-server
  client:
    unauthenticated: false
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: web-app
          namespace: frontend
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: payment-server
  namespace: payments
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: payment-service
  port: 8080
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: payment-auth-backend-order
  namespace: payments
spec:
  server:
    name: payment-server
  client:
    unauthenticated: false
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: order-service
          namespace: backend
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: database-server
  namespace: data
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: database
  port: 5432 # Example port for a database like PostgreSQL
  proxyProtocol: Opaque # Or TCP, depending on database specifics and Linkerd version
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: database-auth-backend-product
  namespace: data
spec:
  server:
    name: database-server
  client:
    unauthenticated: false
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: product-service
          namespace: backend
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: database-auth-payments-payment
  namespace: data
spec:
  server:
    name: database-server
  client:
    unauthenticated: false
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: payment-service
          namespace: payments
